text.title: record-replay-debugging Failure Modes
text.summary: Migrated antipatterns for record-replay-debugging as failure modes. Add detector + repair clauses where missing.

failure-mode.description: Recording only the final answer and a few "important" intermediate steps.
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: Any unrecorded nondeterminism (retry timing, RNG, tool order in parallel calls) breaks replay; you find out the bug is unreproducible the moment you need it most.

failure-mode.description: Treating replay as a record-once / replay-once correctness check.
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: Wastes the main affordance of replay. The harness pays for itself only when one trace is replayed dozens of times under controlled mutations.
